journey-onboard.evidence: Landing page shows a prominent '🚀 Start Creating' button visible without scrolling, linking to /onboarding.

journey-builder.evidence: Three.js Canvas renders (1024x1440) at /builder/new with a sidebar containing shape pickers (Box, Ball, Tube, Cone, Ring) plus Nature, Buildings, and Characters categories.

journey-ai.evidence: Spark AI panel opens from sidebar, typed 'help me', received non-empty response: 'Ooh, I got excited and lost my train of thought! Tell me more about your world! 🌟'.

journey-save.evidence: Save button (💾 Save) exists and is clickable, but localStorage remains empty after save and page reload shows only default state with no persisted world data.

journey-gallery.evidence: Gallery at /gallery renders a grid of 6 world cards (Enchanted Forest, Space Station Alpha, Underwater Kingdom, etc.) with authors and like counts.
